SUNLIT HOLLOW
tend the light · grow the hollow · walk the cycle
🌙 The hollow remembers you, Warden.  
· The Nature of the Hollow ·

You are the Warden of a forest that exists between worlds — alive only as long as someone tends it. Sunlight is memory here. Gather it. Grow the hollow. And when it blooms past all knowing, release it — carrying only your Moonbeams into the next, richer cycle.

How to Tend the Hollow
☀️
Tap the Sun
Call sunlight into the hollow
🌱
Grow Things
Plants gather light while you rest
✨
Discover
Secrets unlock as light builds
🌙
Rebirth
Release everything. Keep your Moonbeams
💾
Walk Away
Light piles up while you're gone
🔊
Sound
Forest ambience — adjust the slider
your progress saves automatically
🌙
Rebirth the Hollow
Your forest has grown magnificent. Release it back to the earth and receive a permanent blessing — every journey after will bloom faster.
🌙 +1 Moonbeam · +20% permanent bonus
All sunlight and upgrades will reset. Moonbeams are eternal.

The Cycle of Renewal
When a forest reaches its fullest bloom, it releases everything back to the earth — and what grows next is richer, deeper, more alive. Each rebirth earns a Moonbeam: a permanent blessing that amplifies all future sunlight.
